input: user-POI check-in sequences and POI geographical graph
output: ranked list of next POIs for a user
backbone: Kernel-Based Graph Neural Network (KBGNN) with geographical module (MPNN) and sequential module (graph kernel NN)
loss: consistency learning (jointly incorporating geographical and sequential information)
key_idea: combine topological geographical influences via MPNN and high-order sequential substructures via graph kernel neural network, with consistency learning to align both modules
datasets: two real-world LBSN datasets (not named in abstract)
